hook: I found out how the big therapy apps really work. So I rebuilt it.
vo: I was training to be a counsellor when I looked under the hood of the big therapy platforms.
A client pays seventy to a hundred dollars a week. The therapist doing the work might see around a third of that.
I had a bit of coding skill. So I built the thing I want to use myself.
Faresay is free to start. No commission on sessions. You set your price. You keep it.
cta: I built the thing I want to use myself.
broll_notes: Close-up of a phone screen showing a clean scheduling or payment interface. Cut to hands typing on a laptop, then back to the phone. No presenter shown. Muted, natural light. No stock-photo energy.
